name: Miracle Limousine

name: Accessibility Solutions LLC
service_types: home and vehicle accessibility EQUIPMENT sales/installation (not a transportation operator)
recent_news: BBB profile shows LLC formed 1/24/2024 in Warren, MN; categorized under 'Wheelchair Accessible Vehicles' but website (accessibilitysolutionsusa.com) markets home and vehicle accessibility equipment, not student transportation services.
fit_notes: Not a target. This is an accessibility-equipment/mobility products dealer (ramps, vehicle conversions), not a school-bus or SPED transportation operator. Should be excluded from Summit tuck-in universe.

name: NTC Transportation Svc
service_types: non-emergency/medical transportation or small special-needs livery (presumed; not confirmed as school-bus)
recent_news: A Facebook page 'Ntc Transportation' was created in 2025 but contains minimal verifiable info. No reference in Natchez-Adams School District materials or Mississippi state contractor lists. The dominant local provider is the unrelated Natchez Transit System.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Four-person Natchez operator with no confirmed school district contract; too small and unverified for Summit tuck-in pipeline.
